description: Cognition cycle glyph defining phases of learning and processing. Each phase maps to a Rosetta shape reflecting the geometric character of that cognitive mode.

phases.name: intake
phases.description: Raw signal absorption. Unstructured data enters the system.

phases.name: pattern_extraction
phases.description: Identify recurring structures in raw input. Separate signal from noise.

phases.name: integration
phases.description: Connect new patterns to existing knowledge graph. Test for consistency.

phases.name: expression
phases.description: Generate output from integrated understanding. Activate response.

phases.name: reflection
phases.description: Evaluate output against intent and ethics. Wisdom gate.

cycle_properties.note: Phase 5 feeds back to Phase 1. The cycle never terminates — learning is perpetual.
